text:
Shauna Burdis

The Paris Olympics are drawing to a close following a spectacular fortnight of sport.

This summer's Games have not only given us a slew of inspiring performances, they have also provided a wave of viral moments.

Watch our video to find out which Olympians have been social media gold over the past fortnight and don't forget to follow @rtenews on TikTok and Instagram.

Video: Shauna Burdis and Philip Bromwell

title: Watch: Which Olympians were social media gold in Paris?
author: Shauna Burdis
description: The Paris Olympics are drawing to a close following a spectacular fortnight of sport.
